title: Amtech S1805 Aluminium bicycle pump
features: COMPACT: This aluminium bicycle pump has a compact and lightweight alloy body with a fold-out T-handle and a useful mounting bracket
VERSATILE: With a dual valve with thumb lock, it works with both Presta and Schrader valves
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Bike pump See more
